text_block_list.text:
As the autumn Tenno Sho draws<n>closer, Silence
Suzuka questions<n>Matikanefukukitaru about
whether<n>she is happy or not.

Matikanefukukitaru answers that,<n>thanks to her
fans and I, she's very<n>happy being able to run her
heart out<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, she asks Silence Suzuka<n>the exact
same question.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka answers that while<n>she isn't quite
happy yet, she has the<n>feeling it's almost within
reach.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Matikanefukukitaru and Silence<n>Suzuka
move forward, each seeking<n>their own form of
happiness.
